meta_desc: Experience the best of Kerala with our 5-day premium family tour covering Munnar
day_2_plan: This 5-day bespoke family itinerary perfectly balances cool mountain tea gardens with the tranquil backwaters. We handle all ground logistics so you can focus on creating memories.
day_3_plan: Arrival in Kochi & Transfer to Munnar. Enjoy Cheeyappara and Valara waterfalls on the scenic drive.
day_4_plan: Munnar Sightseeing: Eravikulam National Park to spot Nilgiri Tahr & Tea Museum.
day_5_plan: Transfer to Thekkady. Enjoy the Periyar Wildlife Safari and local spice plantation tours.
day_6_plan: Transfer to Alleppey. Check into a private premium houseboat for a cruise and overnight stay.
day_7_plan: Morning checkout from the houseboat and safe transfer back to Kochi Airport for departure.

meta_desc: A romantic 7-day luxury Kerala honeymoon package featuring private houseboats
day_2_plan: Designed exclusively for couples seeking romance and privacy. This week-long journey takes you from the misty hills of Munnar to the world-class luxury resorts of Kumarakom and Marari beach.
day_3_plan: VIP Meet & Greet at Kochi Airport and transfer to a luxury resort in Munnar.
day_5_plan: romantic walks through Eravikulam National Park.
day_6_plan: Drive to Thekkady. Private boating on Periyar Lake and evening couples Ayurvedic spa.
day_7_plan: Transfer to Kumarakom. Check into a 5-star lakeside luxury resort and enjoy a sunset cruise.
inclusions: Transfer to Marari Beach. Check into a boutique beach villa and relax by the Arabian Sea.
column18: Transfer to Kochi Airport for departure.

meta_desc: Explore the heritage of Fort Kochi and the serene Alleppey backwaters on this premium 4-day guided tour.
package_overview: Perfect for travelers with limited time who want to experience Kerala's most iconic cultural and coastal highlights. Immerse yourself in colonial history before relaxing on a traditional houseboat.
day_1_plan: Arrival in Kochi. Transfer to Fort Kochi heritage hotel. Evening stroll by the Chinese Fishing Nets.
day_2_plan: Fort Kochi & Mattancherry Sightseeing: Jew Town
day_5_plan: Transfer to Alleppey. Check into a premium private houseboat for an overnight backwater cruise.
day_6_plan: Morning checkout and smooth transfer back to Kochi Airport.
